# watchful-anvil Activity Catalog

> generator: uips-fixtures catalog v0.1
> generated: 2026-03-22T09:34:26Z
> activities: 186
> packages: 5

This file lists all workflow activities in the watchful-anvil curated catalog set.
Each activity is a node that can be placed in a workflow and configured
through its arguments and properties.

**ID format**: `{fullName}@{packageId}/{packageVersion}`
**Argument directions**: In (input), Out (output), InOut (bidirectional)

---
## Package: UiPath.Excel.Activities 3.4.1
*UiPath*
### Read CSV

**ID**: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.ReadCsvFile@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.ReadCsvFile`
**Category**: Excel.CSV
**Description**: Copies all entries from a specified CSV file to an Excel range, table, or sheet, or saves the data for later use in the automation.
**Arguments**:
- `DataTable` (Out): `OutArgument<Data.DataTable>`
- `IgnoreQuotes` (In): `InArgument<Boolean>`
- `FilePath` (In): `InArgument<String>`
- `PathResource` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.Platform.ResourceHandling.IResource>`
- `Encoding` (In): `InArgument<String>`
**Other members**:
- `IncludeColumnNames` [property]: `Boolean`
- `DelimitatorForViewModel` [property]: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.DelimiterOptions`
### Write CSV

**ID**: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.AppendWriteCsvFile@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.AppendWriteCsvFile`
**Category**: Excel.CSV
**Description**: Copies an Excel range, table, or sheet, or table data saved for later, and pastes it in a specified CSV file either pasting it after existing data or replacing any existing data in the file.
**Arguments**:
- `DataTable` (In): `InArgument<Data.DataTable>`
- `FilePath` (In): `InArgument<String>`

- `AddHeaders` [property]: `Boolean`
- `ShouldQuote` [property]: `Boolean`
- `DelimitatorForViewModel` [property]: `UiPath.CSV.Activities.DelimiterOptions`
### ReadRange

**ID**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.ReadRange@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.ReadRange`
**Category**: Excel
**Description**: Reads the value of a range in Range Excel Format from a spreadsheet as a DataTable. If Range isn't specified, the whole spreadsheet is read. If range is specified as a cell, the whole spreadsheet starting from that cell is read.
**Arguments**:
- `Range` (In): `InArgument<String>`
- `DataTable` (Out): `OutArgument<Data.DataTable>`
- `Workbook` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.Excel.Workbook>`
- `WorkbookPath` (In): `InArgument<String>`
- `WorkbookPathResource` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.Platform.ResourceHandling.IResource>`
- `Password` (In): `InArgument<String>`
- `SheetName` (In): `InArgument<String>`
**Other members**:
- `AddHeaders` [property]: `Boolean`
- `PreserveFormat` [property]: `Boolean`
### WriteRange

**ID**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.WriteRange@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.WriteRange`
**Category**: Excel
**Description**: Writes the data from a DataTable in a spreadsheet starting from StartingCell. If StartingCell isn't specified, the writing begins at A1 cell. If the sheet does not exist, a new one is created with the SheetName value. All cells within the DataTable range are overwritten. Changes are immediately saved.
**Arguments**:
- `StartingCell` (In): `InArgument<String>`
- `DataTable` (In): `InArgument<Data.DataTable>`
- `Workbook` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.Excel.Workbook>`
- `WorkbookPath` (In): `InArgument<String>`
- `WorkbookPathResource` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.Platform.ResourceHandling.IResource>`
- `Password` (In): `InArgument<String>`
- `SheetName` (In): `InArgument<String>`
**Other members**:
- `AddHeaders` [property]: `Boolean`

### WriteCell

**ID**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.WriteCell@UiPath.Excel.Activities/3.4.1`
**Type**: `UiPath.Excel.Activities.WriteCell`
**Category**: Excel
**Description**: Writes the Text value into a cell from a spreadsheet. If the sheet does not exist, a new one is created with the SheetName value. If a value exists, it is overwritten. Changes are immediately saved.
**Arguments**:
- `Cell` (In): `InArgument<String>`
- `Text` (In): `InArgument<String>`
- `Workbook` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.Excel.Workbook>`

- `SheetName` (In): `InArgument<String>`

### CV Element Exists

**ID**: `UiPath.CV.Activities.CvElementExistsWithDescriptor@UiPath.UIAutomation.Activities/23.10.20`
**Type**: `UiPath.CV.Activities.CvElementExistsWithDescriptor`
**Category**: UI Automation
**Description**: Searches for a specified UI element on the screen in the foreground using UiPath Computer Vision, and returns a Boolean variable that states whether it was found or not.
**Arguments**:
- `TimeoutMS` (In): `InArgument<Int32>`
- `Descriptor` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.CV.CvDescriptor>`
- `ScrollDirection` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.CV.Scroll>`

- `OutRegion` (Out): `OutArgument<Drawing.Rectangle>`

**Type**: `UiPath.CV.Activities.CVScope`
**Category**: UI Automation
**Description**: A container that enables Computer Vision on a window or element. Also acts as a refresh mechanism.

### CV Type Into

**ID**: `UiPath.CV.Activities.CvTypeIntoWithDescriptor@UiPath.UIAutomation.Activities/23.10.20`
**Type**: `UiPath.CV.Activities.CvTypeIntoWithDescriptor`
**Category**: UI Automation
**Description**: Sends keystrokes to a UI element. Special keys are supported and can be selected from the drop-down list. The UI element is identified using UiPath Computer Vision.
**Arguments**:
- `TimeoutMS` (In): `InArgument<Int32>`
- `DelayMS` (In): `InArgument<Int32>`
- `DelayBetweenKeys` (In): `InArgument<Int32>`
- `DelayBefore` (In): `InArgument<Int32>`
- `Text` (In [required]): `InArgument<UiPath.CV.CvString>`
- `Descriptor` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.CV.CvDescriptor>`
- `ScrollDirection` (In): `InArgument<UiPath.CV.Scroll>`
- `NumberOfScrolls` (In): `InArgument<Int32>`
- `DelayScreenshotAfterScroll` (In): `InArgument<Int32>`
- `InRegion` (In): `InArgument<Drawing.Rectangle>`
- `OutRegion` (Out): `OutArgument<Drawing.Rectangle>`
- `ClickBeforeTyping` (In): `InArgument<Boolean>`
- `EmptyField` (In): `InArgument<Boolean>`
- `Activate` (In): `InArgument<Boolean>`
- `ContinueOnError` (In): `InArgument<Boolean>`
